# Medium horizon — status: minor_revision

**Posture.** 1-2y strategic centerpiece: the household is already diversified across 8 asset classes per the user directive — the work is NVDA-cap reduction at the user-confirmed 3,000 sh/yr cadence (NOT the legacy plan's 10,000 sh/yr), UCITS estate-tax optimization (Irish-domiciled CSPX/ACWD/FWRA/CNDX), and 5-year salary+RSU+ESPP accumulation toward the 22M NIS / age-49 target with continued working margin through 49. Section 102 24-month lockup is lot-aware: 2024-and-earlier grants (213000, 246477) qualify for 25%+3% surtax capital track in 2026; later grants (289172, 289173, 331375, 374434) defer until each grant's 24-month anniversary. Surtax applies in full (28% effective) on every CGT NIS because 2026 base+ESPP runrate (828k NIS) already clears the ~721k threshold before any RSU vest. Patient UCITS deployment continues over urgent rebalancing into RSI-stretched US ETFs. Substrate repair (failed sentiment analyst, tax-lot ingest, attorney retainer, cap-enforcement) precedes new offensive tranches.

## Targets
- **NVDA RSU deconcentration cadence (annual share count)**: 3000.0 shares (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-09-01) — User-confirmed 3,000 sh/yr cadence; ConcentrationAnalyst shows 1,600 sold YTD vs 1,258 target = +342 ahead. Legacy plan's 10,000 sh/yr 2026 schedule rejected: it pushes ordinary-income slice well into 47% bracket and locks 28% effective on all CGT NIS.
- **NVDA share-count at year-end 2026 (3,000/yr cadence)**: 8471.0 shares (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-12-15) — Glide-path: 11,471 (snapshot) − 3,000 = 8,471 at end-2026; → ~5,471 end-2027 → ~2,471 end-2028; reaches 15% strategic by 2031 at constant NVDA price.
- **Restated household savings capacity (post-tax NIS/yr)**: 878000.0 nis (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-09-01) — Restated to include Noga's income + corrected $449k RSU pipeline (legacy plan modeled $100k, a ~4.5x understatement per PlanCritique RED). User directive confirms ~360k NIS/yr bank-side; brokerage-side RSU accumulation (~$315k net/yr) is the second flow.
- **Bank-side household savings (separated flow)**: 360000.0 nis (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-09-01) — Per user directive: (44k bank-net + 9k ESPP − 23k expenses) × 12 = 360k NIS/yr. Separates bank-side savings from brokerage-side RSU accumulation per PlanCritique RED on savings reconciliation.
- **FIRE-bridge funding gap (49→60 liquid drawdown requirement)**: 3047000.0 nis (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-09-01) — 11 years × 277k NIS canonical spend = ~3,047k NIS required from liquid portfolio before age-60 partial unlocks. Current 720k 24-month buffer covers only ~24% of need. Keren hishtalmut 384k withdrawable now (post-6-year vesting); Noga's balance unquantified.
- **Cap-enforcement substrate go-live date (days to go)**: 0.0 days (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-07-16) — Hard milestone 2026-07-15 for sector cap + US-situs cap + estate trip-wire enforcement substrate. Without enforcement substrate, caps are advisory.
- **Redeployment fill discipline — avoid stretched US ETFs at 52w highs**: 0.0 pct_of_portfolio (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-09-01) — 0% incremental allocation target while broad US ETFs (SCHD, VTV, VOO, QQQM, SCHG, SPMO) are RSI > 65 at 52w highs. Operationalizes patient-UCITS theme.
- **NVDA shares qualifying for Section 102 capital track in 2026 (lot-aware)**: 2000.0 shares (stated 2026-06-02; revisit 2026-09-01) — Pre-2024 grants (213000, 246477) cleanly qualify for 25%+3% surtax capital track in 2026; later grants (289172/289173 mid-2024, 331375 2025-03, 374434 2026-03) defer until each 24-month grant anniversary. Approximate 2026-eligible capacity ~2,000 sh, with the 3,000 sh annual target consuming carry into 2027 from later grants as they mature.

## Themes
- **Already-diversified posture — medium work is NVDA-cap reduction + UCITS migration + accumulation, not de-risking** (lean_into) — User directive Wave 8 v2.3 corrects the framing: snapshot supports 8-asset-class diversification with NVDA at ~18% strategic. The medium plan executes targeted reduction of an over-weighted single name and migration of US-situs exposure to UCITS, not a structural transition out of concentration.
- **Section 102 24-month clock is binding and lot-aware** (lean_into) — Selling within 24 months of grant re-classifies the gain as ordinary salary income (47%+ marginal). Award 374434 (grant 2026-03-09) — 24-month threshold March 2028; Award 331375 (grant 2025-03-10) — March 2027; Awards 289172/289173 (mid-2024) — mid-2026 onward. Lot-tagging required before each tranche.
- **Surtax applies in full (28% effective CGT) — not 'potential' 25%** (lean_into) — 2026 base+ESPP runrate 828k NIS already exceeds the ~721k surtax threshold before any RSU vest or NVDA sale. Every marginal CGT NIS is at 28% (25% CGT + 3% surtax). PlanCritique YELLOW.
- **FIRE-bridge 49→60→67 is materially underfunded at 24%** (lean_into) — 11 years × 277k = ~3,047k NIS bridge requirement; current 720k 24-month buffer covers only ~24%. Sequencing required: keren hishtalmut (384k tax-free post-6yr) → age-60 unlocks (executive insurance ~756k, kupat gemel, Tikun 190 eligibility) → age-67 kupat pensia annuity. Noga's keren hishtalmut balance unquantified — material gap.
- **Patient UCITS deployment, not urgent rebalancing** (lean_into) — Broad US ETFs stretched at 52w highs with overbought RSIs; CSPX/ACWD/FWRA are durable vehicles for incremental US-equity exposure with no US-situs estate exposure. No urgency to chase.
- **NVDA RSU treated as external income stream, not managed-portfolio inventory** (lean_into) — Sector-cap denominator excludes NVDA RSU lots; deconcentration is a glidepath, not a forced rebalance. Preserves Section 102 capital-track treatment.
- **Commerce export-loophole closure is a live NVDA-specific catalyst** (monitor) — US Commerce closed the Rubin/Blackwell-to-Chinese-subsidiaries-abroad loophole (NewsAnalyst materiality 0.55, HIGH confidence). Durable TAM compression but does NOT auto-accelerate cadence — 3,000 sh/yr holds.
- **FX tailwind for NIS-savers buying USD-priced UCITS** (lean_into) — USD/NIS at 2.813, USD weakening 4.73% over 30d and 8.56% over 90d. NIS-side buyers get more USD per shekel on UCITS purchases.
- **Broad-market multiple-compression risk on 4.5% real-return assumption** (monitor) — Accepted prior-round delta preserved. Macro regime=neutral (10Y 4.45%, WTI $97.63 stagflation drag), fleet multiples stretched outside NVDA (TSLA PE 424 / PEG 31 on -39% earnings growth, AMD PEG 3.07, AMZN EV/EBITDA 115). Threatens the plan's 4.5% real-return baseline.
- **Substrate repair precedes new tranches** (lean_into) — Sentiment analyst failed citation discipline this cycle; technical analyst FAILED; tax-lot ingest pending; W-8BEN expiry not tracked. Repair before deploy — Ariel's accuracy-over-cost preference applied.

## Actions
- **Execute remaining ~1,400-share NVDA deconcentration to hit 3,000 sh 2026 target; sequence lot-aware, tax-year-spaced** [if(lot_grant_date <= 2024-06-02 AND share lot's 24-month Section 102 clock cleared)]: Sell from pre-mid-2024 grants only (213000, 246477) to qualify for 25%+3% surtax capital track in 2026; carry deferred shares from later grants (289172, 289173, 331375, 374434) into 2027+ as each grant's 24-month anniversary passes. — PlanCritique YELLOW: legacy 10,000 sh/yr 2026 schedule mixes ineligible grants and forces ordinary-rate reclassification. 3,000 sh/yr cadence with lot-aware grant-date eligibility maximizes net proceeds.
- **Migrate residual US-domiciled non-NVDA holdings to UCITS over 24 months**: Phase SCHD, SCHG, VOO, QQQM, SPMO, VTV, SGOV out of taxable Schwab/Leumi accounts into CSPX/ACWD/FWRA/CNDX (Irish-domiciled). Pace sized to drive US-situs tail toward $1.37M target inside the 24-month NVDA-deconcentration window. — PlanCritique GREEN on UCITS routing correctness; YELLOW on understated current $976k vs $1.21M-$1.37M actual tail.
- **Wire cap-enforcement substrate (sector + US-situs + estate trip-wire)** [2026-07-15]: Encode 35% info-tech sector cap (managed-portfolio denominator excluding NVDA RSU), $1.5M US-situs new-position ceiling, and $60k NRA-exemption estate trip-wire into proposal-generation pipeline. — Without enforcement substrate, caps drift unmonitored. PlanCritique YELLOW on sector exposure, RED on estate gap force this to be hard-dated.
- **Add explicit FIRE-bridge analysis table (49→60→67)** [2026-08-01]: Model annual 277k NIS drawdown ages 49-60 from liquid portfolio (~3,047k cumulative); sequence keren hishtalmut tax-free withdrawals (384k Ariel + Noga TBD); age-60 partial unlocks (executive insurance ~756k, kupat gemel, Tikun 190 eligibility); age-67 full kupat pensia annuity activation. — Accepted prior-round delta preserved. Closes PlanCritique YELLOW on 24% bridge coverage. Quantifies Noga's keren hishtalmut as a critical data gap.
- **Cross-border attorney retainer (IL/RO/US) — hard deadline** [2026-06-10]: Retain cross-border estate-planning attorney by 2026-06-10; auto-defer next quarterly NVDA tranche if retainer not engaged. — will_exists=false, 2 minor children, assets across 3 jurisdictions, US-situs tail ~$1.21M-$1.37M. PlanCritique RED: 706-NA filing burden lands on heirs with no executor.
- **Dispatch domain-refresh: Israeli tax substrate** [2026-06-08]: Re-validate Section 102, 3(i), Bituach Leumi monthly ceiling, surtax threshold, 2026 bracket boundaries against current ITA / BTL publications. All current domain files carry last_verified=1900-01-01. — TaxAnalyst self-flagged LOW confidence due to stale domain files; bracket-boundary drift already evidenced (plan 81,480 vs domain 84,120).
- **Dispatch domain-refresh: US NRA estate-tax substrate** [2026-06-15]: Re-validate $60k NRA exemption, 40% top rate, Form 706-NA filing window, US-situs scope (NVDA + US ETFs + Atlanta SFR) against current IRS publications. — Estate gap elevated to top-three structural risk; substrate must be primary-source-validated before user-facing legal action.
- **Re-run failed analysts with citation discipline (sentiment, technical)** [if(SentimentAnalystAgent or TechnicalAnalystAgent not repaired by 2026-06-15)]: If failed-citation analysts have not been re-run with mandatory cited_sources populated by 2026-06-15, all equity-allocation gates auto-suspend until repair. — This cycle's SentimentAnalyst emitted empty citations; TechnicalAnalyst FAILED; ConcentrationAnalyst missing plan_targets. Decisions cannot be made on broken substrate.
- **Encode multi-year NVDA glide-path into plan_targets**: Encode the NVDA share-count glide (end-2026 8,471 sh → end-2027 5,471 sh → end-2028 2,471 sh → 15% strategic by 2031) into plan_targets so ConcentrationAnalyst has a target to score against. — ConcentrationAnalyst self-flagged 'No plan_targets supplied, so no per-category deltas or formal breaches computed'.
- **Redeployment routing rule — avoid US large-cap growth wrappers on NVDA-sale proceeds** [if(target.RSI_14 > 65 AND target at 52w high)]: Do not route NVDA-sale or RSU-vest proceeds into SCHD/VTV/VOO/QQQM/SCHG/SPMO this cycle. Route to SGOV (parking) or UCITS top-up (CSPX/ACWD/FWRA) instead. — Broad US ETFs stretched; SCHD/VTV at exit signals; VOO/QQQM/SCHG hold-don't-add.

- **Quantify Noga's keren hishtalmut balance** [2026-08-01]: Surface Noga's keren hishtalmut balance into household_budget / pension memo line; critical input to FIRE-bridge tax-free pre-60 withdrawal sequencing. — PlanCritique YELLOW: Noga's balance unknown is material gap for bridge sequencing; keren hishtalmut is the only material tax-free pre-60 withdrawal vehicle.

- [added] Add Section 102 24-month lot-aware theme to make the constraint explicit at medium horizon. (theme `medium.themes.section_102_24mo_clock_lot_aware`)
- [added] Add 'surtax applies in full' theme — every CGT NIS is at 28%, not 25%. (theme `medium.themes.surtax_in_full_28pct`)

## Rationale
Medium horizon is the strategic centerpiece. The bear-won debate reinforces — not displaces — the substrate already laid down: 3,000 sh/yr NVDA cadence, UCITS-first deployment, NVDA RSU carved out of sector denominator, cap-enforcement substrate by 2026-07-15. The minor revisions this cycle: (a) retract the incorrect 'transition from concentrated single stock' framing — user directive Wave 8 v2.3 confirms portfolio is already 8-asset-class diversified; (b) add explicit Section 102 lot-aware constraint (pre-2024 grants only qualify in 2026; later grants defer to each 24-month anniversary); (c) add explicit surtax-in-full theme (28% on every CGT NIS, not 25% 'potential'); (d) add explicit FIRE-bridge underfunding theme (24% coverage, ~3.047M NIS gap); (e) separate bank-side 360k NIS/yr savings from brokerage-side $315k net/yr RSU accumulation per PlanCritique RED; (f) add target for Noga's keren hishtalmut balance quantification. The bull's strongest argument (front-load USD purchases on FX tailwind) is fully addressed by the patient-UCITS theme. The bear's strongest argument (don't chase RSI > 65 ETFs at 52w highs) is operationalized by the redeployment routing rule. Confidence MEDIUM: data is LIVE but tax-substrate domain files carry last_verified=1900-01-01 pending domain-refresh; sentiment and technical analyst outputs failed citation discipline this cycle.
